titleStmt.title: SII 10.544: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 544. (A.R. No. 270 of 1924.) ON A PILLAR SET UP IN THE TEMPLE OF ĀÑJANĒYASVĀMI AT KONAKANCHI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Undated.

summary.p: States that, while Pōtarāja was ruling the Nāthavāḍi country with Guḍimeṭla as his capital, his kāmpu Bīrama's sons Kaśśevu-Seṭṭi and Kuṟivi-Seṭṭi and the latter's wife Sūrama got the temple of Narēndrēśvara plastered, consecrated the images of Nārāyaṇadēva and Brahmadēva and also got the temples of attendant gods plastered, and gave two tanks for the naivēdya and Pātrapāguḍamu in these temples. Also states that Kuṟṟi-Seṭṭi of the Teliki thousand tribe of Bejevāḍa presented two lamps to the temples.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī
svasti samadhigatapancamahā
śabda mahāmaṁḍalēśva
rapadavirājamānu laina
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra pōtarājulu guḍimeṭla
rājadhānigā rājyaṁbu
nāthavāḍiṁ jēyucuṁ
ḍaṁgā vāri kāṁpu Appi
seṭṭi birama koḍukulu ka
śśevuseṭṭiyuṁ kuṟivi
seṭṭiyu niyana . peṁḍla
mu sūramayu narē
ṁdrēśvaradēvara guḍiki su
nnamu veṭṭi nārāyaṇa
dēvarabrahmadēvaralaṁ brati
ṣṭalu sēsi parivāradē
vatala guḍlaku sunnamu
veṭṭi gōrāceṟuvuko
ṁḍavi ceṟuvu nivēdya
munakuṁ pātra pāguḍa
munakuṁ gā nicce . svasti
yamaniyamadhammaparāya
ṇabrahmasaṁbhava manu
vaṁśakulāsvaya sakala
kalāvidu laina śrīmatu
bejevāḍa telikivēvuraku
luṁ ḍaina kuṟṟiseṭṭi dīpamā
lalu reṁḍusēyiṁcce .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harati vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭi rvva
rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 10.544 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
